steps.title: Identify the highest bar in the graph
steps.content: The question asks for the highest percentage of lithium recovered. Scan all four bars in the graph: Type A Process 1 reaches about 29%, Type A Process 2 reaches about 55%, Type B Process 1 reaches about 35%, and Type B Process 2 (the dark bar on the far right) reaches the highest point on the y-axis.

steps.title: Read the value and match it to a choice
steps.content:
The tallest bar—Type B Process 2—reaches approximately 76% on the y-axis. This value is closest to 75%. The other three choices (10%, 20%, and 45%) do not correspond to the highest bar in the graph.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
